content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA
FRANCHISE TAX BOARD
Mailing Address:
Legal Division
P.O. Box 1468
Sacramento, CA 95812-1468
(916) 369-3305

Oct 15 9:39 AM '92

In reply refer to:
410:PSP:jb:fppc


October 15, 1992


Ms. Luisa Menchaca
Counsel, Legal Division
California Fair Political Practices
Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA  95804-0807

Re:  Request for Advice, File No. A-92-474

Dear Ms. Menchaca:

Please confirm my understanding of our telephone conversation of
October 15, 1992, pertaining to subject advice request.

In response to my question as to whether the mass mailing
prohibitions of Section 89001 of the Political Reform Act would
be violated by including within the tax booklets a letter to
taxpayers signed by the "Franchise Tax Board," you responded that
this would be permissible so long as the signature was limited to
the "Franchise Tax Board" and did not contain the names or any
reference to individual board members.

Sincerely,

Peter S. Pierson
Assistant Chief Counsel
